_schema.note: Manually-captured builder submissions for ZABAL Gamez. Durable record; the live /submissions board is KV-fed from public activity, so these are the source to promote there (builder posts publicly OR an operator inserts via /api/submission-intake). Run scripts/promote-submissions.mjs to push complete projects to the intake API.
_schema.status_values: partial (WIP) | complete (ready to promote) | planned (not yet built)
_schema.sparkz_potential: high (multiple working projects, ZAO ecosystem fit) | medium (one working project) | low (planned only)
_schema.empire_path: How this builder should onboard to the zabalgamez01e9af empire on Empire Builder

submissions.name: Brandon (ghostmintops)
submissions.empire_path: Join zabalgamez01e9af on Empire Builder via /leaderboard. Multiple live builds qualify for points. DreamNet Publishing + Proof Drop are the strongest ZAO-ecosystem fits.

projects.name: ZABAL Recording Scout
projects.desc: Turns the ZABAL recording archive into a builder-facing board - pick a lane, find useful sessions, open recordings/transcripts, turn them into July build ideas. Includes a human-reviewed Farcaster Artist Scout concept.

projects.name: Proof Drop
projects.desc: A tool that helps builders prove what they shipped, hashed locally, post-ready. First July build on the site.

projects.name: WaveWarZ Gravity Board
projects.desc: WaveWarZ dashboard UI upgrade - visualizes more than cumulative volume. Directly extends ZAO ecosystem tooling.

projects.name: DreamNet Publishing
projects.desc: Farcaster mini-app publishing house. Aligns with ZAO's creator-IP mission.

projects.name: ZAO music (Droid With A Wallet / ZAO anthem)
projects.desc: Original ZAO/ZABAL songs made with Suno. Artist track - music IP for the ZAO ecosystem.

projects.name: IDE tutorial video series
projects.desc: Planned: setup + walkthrough videos for top IDEs (Windsurf, Antigravity, VS Code), interactive with quizzes.

submissions.name: Branth (KORRO / Korrocorp)
submissions.empire_path: Join zabalgamez01e9af on Empire Builder. WaveWarZ Bridge Portal is the flagship - it directly grows WaveWarZ participation from Base users, which is a ZAO north-star metric.

projects.name: WaveWarZ Bridge Portal
projects.desc: ETH->SOL on-ramp so Base users can get SOL and join WaveWarZ battles/trading. Base->Solana via Mayan + Wormhole. Mobile-friendly, working testnet + mainnet.

projects.name: Solana MCP
projects.desc: One-click MCP so any agent can connect and interact with the Solana chain.

projects.name: AI music generator
projects.desc: WIP AI music generation tool for artist track.

projects.name: Onklaud 5
projects.desc: Open-source AI fusion model pipeline (Kimi K2.7 + GLM 5.2 + DeepSeek V4 Pro) with cost-saving layers.

submissions.name: jdwalka (JohnDaWalka)
submissions.empire_path: Join zabalgamez01e9af on Empire Builder. Chroma Poker is the flagship - a live Farcaster app with real users. Community hosting (Spaces) also earns creator track points.

projects.name: Chroma Poker
projects.desc: Farcaster poker app - live HUD, multi-site poker tracker, hand-history parsing. Iterating on bugs.

projects.name: Crypto Prediction Orchestrator
projects.desc: 5/15-minute and hourly binary crypto prediction orchestrator connecting 22+ exchanges plus raw on-chain data.

projects.name: Predictive apps Space
projects.desc: Hosts Farcaster Spaces on predictive apps and coding for the community. Creator/community track.
